comment: Curator pass 2026-06-10 (setup/retone-accreditations.py, tonal machinery from setup/retone-logos.py): all 14 accreditation marks in reference/site-assets/accreditation/ identified by vision from the mark itself - no invented certifications. Known-set cross-check: amfori, Better Work Bangladesh, STeP, OCS, GRS, RCS, BSCI present; NO BGMEA mark exists in the source folder - do not add one. file paths are relative to src/; file=null means the #D6D6D6 re-tone failed the dark-ground legibility check (needs-manual, preview kept in setup/retone-preview/). complianceComment: the 'certifies' / 'removes' lines (Phase 2 / PROPOSAL.md) describe the PUBLIC scope of each external standard and the buyer risk it addresses - they make no claim about Rizvi beyond displaying the mark, and assert no specific audit grade or date (that is the flagged content gap). OWNER/LEGAL REVIEW recommended before relying on this copy.

logos.name: amfori BSCI
logos.certifies: Audited social-compliance performance across the supply chain against the amfori BSCI Code of Conduct.
logos.removes: the risk of unmonitored labour conditions in your supply chain.

logos.name: Better Work Bangladesh
logos.certifies: Participation in the ILO and IFC programme that improves labour standards and working conditions.
logos.removes: doubt over independent oversight of factory working conditions.

logos.name: BSCI
logos.certifies: Social-compliance auditing against the Business Social Compliance Initiative code.
logos.removes: exposure to undocumented labour practices on the floor.

logos.name: Global Recycled Standard (GRS)
logos.certifies: Verified recycled content with full chain of custody, plus environmental and social criteria.
logos.removes: the risk of unsubstantiated recycled-content claims.

logos.name: Global Organic Textile Standard (GOTS)
logos.certifies: Organic fibre content together with environmentally and socially responsible processing.
logos.removes: uncertainty over organic claims and chemical inputs.

logos.name: Higg Index
logos.certifies: Standardised measurement of the facility's environmental and social impact (Cascale / SAC).
logos.removes: the absence of comparable sustainability data across suppliers.

logos.name: OEKO-TEX Standard 100
logos.certifies: Every component tested against strict limits for harmful substances.
logos.removes: the risk of restricted substances reaching the finished garment.

logos.name: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 (Confidence in Textiles badge)
logos.certifies: Independent laboratory testing of materials for chemical safety.
logos.removes: concern over harmful chemistry in the product.

logos.name: OEKO-TEX STeP
logos.certifies: Sustainable textile production at the facility level - chemicals, environment, social and quality management.
logos.removes: uncertainty about responsible production at the plant.

logos.name: Organic Content Standard (OCS)
logos.certifies: Verified organic material content with chain of custody from source to product.
logos.removes: the risk of overstated organic-content claims.

logos.name: Recycled Claim Standard (RCS)
logos.certifies: Verified recycled input with chain of custody through the supply chain.
logos.removes: the risk of unverified recycled-input claims.

logos.name: RMG Sustainability Council (RSC)
logos.certifies: Building, fire and electrical safety with ongoing worker-safety oversight in Bangladesh.
logos.removes: structural and fire-safety risk when sourcing from the region.

logos.name: Sedex
logos.certifies: Ethical-trade data and SMETA audit findings shared transparently with buyers.
logos.removes: blind spots in responsible-sourcing due diligence.

logos.name: WRAP
logos.certifies: Lawful, humane and ethical manufacturing at the facility (Worldwide Responsible Accredited Production).
